description:
Property Reference: 2789778.

We are pleased to offer this superb 2 double bedroom apartment in the Heart of Stratford, just a short walk from Stratford Station and all local amenities. Available now! 

 Back on the market following recent redecoration, this well-presented property offers bright, modern living throughout. The spacious living room provides direct access to a large private balcony overlooking Theatre Square, creating an ideal space for relaxing or entertaining. There is also a separate fully fitted kitchen with all appliances, two generous double bedrooms with wardrobes, a family bathroom, and clean, neutral décor throughout. EPC rating of C.Situated within the prestigious and well-maintained Gerry Raffles Square development, residents benefit from an onsite concierge service and two lift access. The apartment is ideally positioned close to Westfield Stratford City, Stratford Shopping Centre, and Stratford High Street, offering excellent shopping, dining, and entertainment options.The property also benefits from outstanding transport links, making commuting into Central London, the City, and Canary Wharf quick and convenient.

listing_title: Chelsea Cloisters, Sloane Avenue, London, SW3
location: Chelsea Cloisters, Sloane Avenue, London, SW3
description:
Nestled in the prestigious of Kensington and Chelsea borough, this spacious 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment offers a comfortable living space filled with natural light. Situated on the 5th floor of the iconic Chelsea Cloisters development on Sloane Avenue, convenience and security are paramount with a 24-hour concierge and easy lift access.



Inside, you'll find two double bedrooms, one featuring just renovated en-suite bathroom, along with ample storage provided by built-in closets in both the bedrooms and hallway. The kitchen is equipped with essential appliances including a full-size fridge/freezer, oven, cooking hob, dishwasher, and plenty of storage space. In the bathroom, you'll find a washer/dryer for added convenience. Ready for immediate move-in, this apartment comes fully furnished.



Benefit from the superb location with seamless access to transportation links. South Kensington station is just a 5-minute walk away, serving the Piccadilly, Circle, and District lines, while the nearest bus stop, servicing the 360 bus, is only a minute's walk away.



Enjoy the vibrant surroundings of this sought-after neighbourhood, enriched with local amenities including shops, restaurants, and the convenience of a nearby Sainsbury's, open until midnight every day.



With South Kensington Station within easy reach, as well as the amenities of Chelsea and Knightsbridge just a short walk away, this apartment offers the perfect blend of comfort and convenience.



EPC: C

Council tax band: FRead full description

description:
Metra Living are proud to present this stunning one-bedroom apartment at this sought after development at Barking Riverside.The property comprises of a good-sized bedroom, a modern family sized bathroom and a spacious fully equipped open plan living/kitchen/dining area. These apartments offer ample storage space, fantastic specifications and a private balcony and a private allocated parking space.Barking Riverside is a pet-friendly development and benefits from various nearby amenities.The development sits close to a number of transport links, including Barking Riverside Station (8 minutes walk away) and a selection of local busses.

"The new Barking Riverside Station on London Overground now connects passengers to central London in as little as 22 minutes and to Barking in 7 minutes."- TFL Website.



The nearby Thames Clipper pier offers another great way to access The City, with Uber Boats scheduled every 20-30 minutes.



As part of our already extensive property portfolio, at Metra living we take a great deal of pride in the status of our developments, dedicating an in-house maintenance team to our property management and servicing. This ensures that as a tenant, you are never far from aid should anything go wrong letting you enjoy peace of mind for as long as you make one of these apartments your home.

Entering into the property via an entrance hallway, off of which is the reception room with the high ceilings and large bay windows. The bathroom is spacious and in contemporary fashion. The kitchen itself also benefits from the substantial worktops and again offers modern facilities. There is a double bedroom to the rear. The whole apartment has plenty of natural light.

Alderney Street is a desirable location within the Pimlico Grid, offering walking distance to the amenities of Victoria to the East and a short walk across to the illustrious Pimlico Road in Belgravia offering the well-known antique and furniture shops and the well-loved farmers market at the weekend. A little further along the Pimlico Road can be found Sloane Square and Knightsbridge for some of the World's most recognised shops, bars and restaurants. The flat has multiple transport links available, including Victoria Station a short walk away for Victoria, Circle and District Lines as well as National Rail and Gatwick Express services. Both Sloane Square (Circle and District Lines) and Pimlico (Victoria Line) are within walking distance also. A little further to the South is the River Thames with the Nine Elms area developing on the opposite bank and the Tate Gallery and Parliament Square along the North side of the river as you cross into Westminster.

Security Deposit: £2,595
Council Tax Band: E

Information contained within this listing is for guidance only and should be checked and confirmed (prior to proceeding).

listing_title: Bow View Apartments, Bow Green, E3
location: Bow View Apartments, Bow Green, E3
amenities: Under 10 minutes to Mile End station
description:
Available April | Unfurnished two bedroom apartment in Bow View Apartments, E3.

Located on a lower floor is this spacious and elegant two bedroom apartment the perfect opportunity for anyone looking to make Bow their new home.

Spread over 817 Sq.Ft this dual aspect, two bedroom, two bathroom apartment is the ideal retreat after a stressful week at work, or for simply entertaining family & friends. The open-plan living room offers two distinct spaces, the first is the kitchen & dining area where budding chefs will have access to fully integrated Bosh appliances and plenty of counter space to cook up a storm! This then seamlessly leads into the second section of the living room, were you are treated to a corner exposure offering both South and West orientation overlooking the beautiful cobbled street and water fountain all from the lounge and the 80 sq.ft private balcony.

Both the principal and second bedrooms are of excellent size and both offer the tranquil views over the landscaped gardens as they are from the balcony. The principal bedroom offers a walk-in wardrobe area along with a sleek and modern en-suite which includes a walk-in shower, mirrored vanity cabinet with shelving, lighting and lined in timber laminate and a stainless steel heated towel rail.

Living in Bow Green isn't just a gorgeous new apartment but its a stunning array of phenomenal resident exclusive amenities which rival those seen in Canary Wharf! Resident amenities include:
- 24/7 concierge & parcel collection
- State-of-the-art gym & boxing ring
- Indoor & outdoor swimming pool
- Sauna, steam room & treatment room
- UK's first residential IMAX cinema room
- Residents lounge & co-working space
- The Canopy Restaurant

Bow Green is a flagship project by St James, part of the renowned Berkeley Group. Known for their commitment to quality, sustainability, and community enrichment, St James has meticulously designed Bow Green to blend contemporary living with heritage charm. Their vision is reflected in the restoration of iconic structures like 120 Bow and the creation of vibrant communal spaces, such as Bow Yard and the botanical gardens, ensuring a harmonious coexistence of old and new.

The development also provides easy access to London’s key universities, such as Queen Mary University (a 15-minute walk), UCL, and King’s College London. Bow Green boasts unparalleled connectivity with three tube and DLR stations—Bow Road (DLR & District Line), Devons Road (DLR), and Mile End (Central line) within walking distance. Residents benefit from direct links to:
- Canary Wharf in 10 minutes.
- Liverpool Street in 15 minutes..
- Bond Street in 18 MinutesDisclaimerThese particulars are intended to give a fair description of the property but their accuracy cannot be guaranteed and they do not constitute an offer of contract. Intending purchasers must rely on their own inspection of the property.



None of the above appliances/services have been tested by Romans & Partners. We recommend purchasers arrange for a qualified person to check all appliances/services before making any legal commitment.Read full description

description:
This modern and generously proportioned three double bedroom, two bathroom period conversion flat is arranged over two levels and boasts a private patio and garden, conveniently situated close to Clapham North and Brixton.


A modern, spacious three double bedroom, two bathroom period conversion, set over two levels, offering a private patio and garden situated a short distance to Clapham North, Brixton and Stockwell tube station.

The stunning flat is set over 925 sq ft and comprises of a spacious open plan kitchen/reception with doors out to a small private garden. Three genuine double bedrooms offering ease for desk space, two bathrooms and an abundance of natural light through the lounge area. 

Landor Road is situated moments from the popular shops, bars and restaurants of Clapham High Street and the boutique amenities of Brixton. Transport links are easily accessible with Clapham North offering the Northern Line and Brixton/Stockwell the Victoria Line. You also have the option of the London Overground services with Clapham High Street Station a short distance away.

Known for its art scene, Deptford is a hub of creativity and home to various local businesses and art galleries as well as this brand new development which offers vibrant city living and great transport links, making these apartments perfect for young professionals, those studying nearby and budding families alike.



This Zone 2 apartment is ideally situated under 10 minute walk to both Greenwich Station and Deptford Bridge DLR with an array of cafes, restaurants, entertainment and the famous Greenwich Market just over 10 minutes’ walk away. Greenwich Park and Greenwich university are also within close proximity to the development.

Inside this two-bedroom apartment is finished to a high standard and benefits from two good sized bedrooms with a fitted wardrobe to the master bedroom, open planned living space with fully fitted appliances including dishwasher, a modern 3-piece bathroom suite and spacious outdoor space.

description:
Located on the exclusive Wetherby Gardens private garden square of South Kensington, this beautifully presented apartment within a modern development behind a period facade, offers a delightful blend of classic elegance and modern comfort.  With two well-proportioned bedrooms and a luxury marble-tiled shower room, this property is perfect for those seeking a serene urban retreat.

The semi-open plan living area is designed to maximise space and light, featuring high ceilings and large sash windows that invites the natural light to flood in.  The beautiful oak flooring throughout adds a touch of warmth and sophistication, making it an inviting space for both relaxation and entertaining.

One of the standout features of this property is the access to a wonderful hidden communal garden, providing a tranquil escape from the hustle and bustle of city life.  This serene retreat is perfect for unwinding after a busy day or enjoying a leisurely weekend.

This Victorian flat in South Kensington is not just a home; it is a lifestyle choice, offering a perfect balance of comfort, convenience, and charm. Whether you are a first-time buyer or looking for a rental opportunity, this property is sure to impress. Conveniently located just a five-minute stroll from Gloucester Road Underground Station, residents will enjoy easy access to the District and Circle lines, making commuting and exploring the vibrant city of London a breeze.

The property offers a bright and spacious open-plan living and dining area, with sliding patio doors opening directly onto a private garden, the newly-fitted modern kitchen is finished to a high standard, featuring sleek plenty of storage and integrated appliances.

Upstairs, the property comprises three well-proportioned bedrooms. The principal bedroom benefits from a contemporary en-suite shower room and a private balcony and built-in storage, while two further bedrooms are served by a modern family bathroom, making the layout ideal for families.

Set within a peaceful mews, the property provides a sense of privacy while being just moments from Wandsworth Town and Earlsfield, offering excellent transport links into Central London. A wide range of shops, cafes, restaurants, and green spaces are all within easy reach.  The house is available on an unfurnished basis.  The house comes with 1 allocated parking space.

A spacious and versatile split-level apartment ideally positioned on Norbury High Street, just a minute’s walk from the mainline station and surrounded by a wide selection of cafés, eateries, and everyday amenities.

Arranged over two floors, the upper level offers two well proportioned bedrooms alongside an expansive landing area, perfectly suited as a secondary living and dining space. Alternatively, the layout can be enjoyed as a generous one-bedroom home with a formal reception/diner, with the landing providing an ideal space for dining, a home office, or additional storage. Large windows throughout flood the apartment with natural light, enhancing the sense of space.

The first floor welcomes you into a bright and spacious fitted kitchen, complete with ample cupboard storage, with access to a modern shower room located just off the kitchen.

Please note, there is no parking with the property—applicants are advised to make their own enquiries regarding permit availability.

Ideal for a single working professional or a couple, this is truly an apartment well worth viewing in person. Call today to secure a viewing slot to avoid disappointment.

We are proud to offer this double bedroom in a 4 bedroom luxury house close to the River Thames in a great location on a private estate. Walking distance to Island Gardens is 7mins and Canary Wharf is 20mins. Off-street parking available.

Suitable for SINGLE FEMALE only (one person).

The house was completely refurbished in 2020. The house will suit somebody who wants a high standard of accommodation, cleanliness (a cleaner is included in the price) and sociable sleeping hours.  This will not suit anybody who wants a share that encompasses late-night socialising.

The property has three floors and the top two floors have 2-bedrooms sharing a bathroom, with the ground floor comprising of a shared kitchen and communal area.

The two top floor bedrooms are currently let to two males. In terms of the middle floor we currently have one of the rooms let to a professional female and she wants the new tenant to also be female as you'll be sharing a floor/bathroom.

Available from 10 May, this property benefits from private garden access with table and chairs which is a sun trap in the summer.

The bedroom is offered furnished and has a wired internet connection (in addition to Wi-Fi throughout the house). The rest of the property is fully furnished and has everything you would need in the kitchen, lounge, etc.

The house has been refurbished to a high specification including Bosch appliances throughout the kitchen and virtually everything in the house is reasonably new and modern.

Viewing highly recommended as this is a beautiful house. Contact OpenRent today for more details or to arrange a viewing!

listing_title: Peninsula Gardens, Mabyn Lane, Lower Riverside, Greenwich Peninsula, SE10
location: Peninsula Gardens, Mabyn Lane, Lower Riverside, Greenwich Peninsula, SE10
description:
This BRAND NEW, studio apartment sits on the 4th floor of the building with unobstructed views out across the peninsula. It features 458sqft of internal space including a bathroom, a large open-plan living/kitchen area and built in storage facilities, alongside an additional balcony.

Peninsula Gardens is a family of four buildings nestled between the park and the river. It's located in the heart of Greenwich Peninsula; and just minutes from North Greenwich Underground Station - Zone 2.

The interiors; designed by Knight Dragon Interior Design, boast natural colours throughout. A nod to the nature on its doorstep. Softer textures and warm, autumnal colours make sure each bedroom is as comfortable as possible, while the bathroom is a combination of sleek white finishes and mirrored cabinets, with off-white porcelain floor tiles to add a touch of distinction.


Amenities:

Make the most of a whole host of amenities at the neighbourhood's resident hub, Aperture, just 1 minute away. Here, you will find shared workspaces, a private gym, a neighbourhood nursery, a Co-op and the new restaurant, EatFan, offering delicious fresh pan-Asian food. Plus, living at Peninsula Gardens gives you access to the 24/7 concierge.


Location:

Peninsula Gardens is uniquely positioned between the River Thames and Central Park, just minutes away from the O2 Arena and London's Design District, a permanent workspace supporting 1,800 creatives. The Peninsula also offers a brilliant mix of independent cafes, bars and restaurants, including Canteen Food Hall & Bar, as well as shops, pharmacies, and local schools, all surrounded by acres of outdoor green space, The Tide; an elevated 5km walking/running route around the Thames and a golf driving range.

location: 22 Belgrave Road, Stepney Green, London, E1 0NR
description: A bright and spacious two-bedroom flat on Belgrave Road in the heart of Stepney Green. The property features a generous open-plan reception room, modern kitchen with integrated appliances, and excellent transport links via Stepney Green tube (District/Hammersmith & City) and Mile End (Central line). The N15 night bus runs directly to UCLH, and PureGym Mile End is just a 5-minute walk. Mile End Medical Centre is nearby for GP services.

A stylish one-bedroom flat on the iconic Narrow Street in Limehouse, overlooking the Thames. Limehouse DLR station is just 4 minutes away, offering direct services to Canary Wharf in under 10 minutes. The area boasts a vibrant dining scene including the historic Grapes pub. Night bus routes provide excellent late-night connectivity across London.

location: 37 Burdett Road, Mile End, London, E3 7TN
description: A well-presented two-bedroom flat on Burdett Road, perfectly positioned between Mile End and Bow. Mile End station (Central, District, Hammersmith & City lines) is a short walk, providing swift access to Canary Wharf via the Jubilee line at Stratford. Mile End Park and the Regent's Canal offer excellent green space, and a local GP surgery is within easy reach.

A characterful two-bedroom flat on the bustling Whitechapel Road with excellent Elizabeth line connectivity to Canary Wharf in under 5 minutes. Whitechapel station also serves the District and Hammersmith & City lines. The area is rich in cultural diversity with the famous Whitechapel Market and Gallery right on the doorstep.

A contemporary one-bedroom flat in a modern development on Aberfeldy Street, Poplar. Poplar DLR station is a 3-minute walk with direct trains to Canary Wharf in just 2 stops. The area has seen significant regeneration with new cafes, shops, and the Chrisp Street Market all within walking distance.

A charming two-bedroom flat in a Victorian conversion on Fairfield Road, Bow. Bow Road station (District/Hammersmith & City) and Bow Church DLR provide easy access to Canary Wharf and the City. The property benefits from a private garden and is close to the beautiful Victoria Park for weekend strolls.

A rare ground-floor two-bedroom flat on the prestigious Cleaver Square in Kennington, featuring allocated parking and a private garden. Kennington station (Northern line) is a 5-minute walk, connecting directly to Waterloo and Westminster for St Thomas' Hospital. The N155 night bus runs 24 hours along Kennington Road. An outstanding-rated primary school is within the catchment area, making this ideal for families.

location: 44 Westmoreland Road, Elephant & Castle, London, SE17 2BY
description: A well-maintained two-bedroom flat on Westmoreland Road in Elephant & Castle, featuring an allocated parking space. Elephant & Castle station (Northern and Bakerloo lines) provides direct access to Westminster for St Thomas' Hospital in under 10 minutes. Several well-regarded primary schools are within walking distance, and the newly regenerated Elephant Park offers excellent green space.

location: 27 South Lambeth Road, Vauxhall, London, SW8 1SP
description: A sleek one-bedroom flat on South Lambeth Road in Vauxhall, within a modern development offering secure parking. Vauxhall station (Victoria line and South Western Railway) is a 6-minute walk, connecting to Westminster in 4 minutes. The area is popular with healthcare professionals due to its proximity to St Thomas' and excellent transport links.

A practical two-bedroom ground-floor flat on Wansey Street in Walworth, ideal for those needing easy access and parking. Regular bus routes along Walworth Road connect to Westminster and St Thomas' Hospital in approximately 15 minutes. A highly regarded local primary school is within a short walk, and the East Street Market offers affordable fresh produce.

A modern two-bedroom flat on Long Lane in Bermondsey, offering street parking and excellent connectivity. Bermondsey station (Jubilee line) is a 7-minute walk, providing quick access to Westminster for St Thomas' Hospital. The vibrant Bermondsey Street with its restaurants and galleries is nearby, along with well-regarded local primary schools.

A spacious two-bedroom flat on Binfield Road in Stockwell, offering excellent value with resident parking. Stockwell station (Northern and Victoria lines) connects to Westminster in under 10 minutes. The property is close to Larkhall Park and several primary schools, making it a practical choice for budget-conscious families working at St Thomas' Hospital.

A well-proportioned studio flat on the peaceful Trinity Street in Borough, located on a quiet residential street away from main roads. A Boots pharmacy is just around the corner on Borough High Street. London Bridge station provides Northern line access to Waterloo (King's Strand campus) in 3 minutes, and Denmark Hill campus is reachable via London Bridge to Denmark Hill trains. Borough station (Northern line) is also a short walk.

location: 28 Brandon Street, Elephant & Castle, London, SE1 7LU
description: A compact and modern studio on Brandon Street near Elephant & Castle, ideal for student living. Elephant & Castle station (Northern and Bakerloo lines) connects directly to Waterloo for King's Strand campus in under 5 minutes. A local pharmacy is on the ground floor of the nearby shopping centre, and the area benefits from a large Tesco and multiple bus routes to all King's campuses.

A well-presented studio in the Hatfields development, set back from the main road in a quiet courtyard. Southwark station (Jubilee line) is a 4-minute walk, connecting to Waterloo for King's Strand campus in one stop. A Lloyds pharmacy is on nearby Blackfriars Road. The Tate Modern and South Bank cultural quarter are within pleasant walking distance.

location: 7 Melior Place, London Bridge, London, SE1 3NF
description: A smart one-bedroom flat on the peaceful Melior Place, a quiet cul-de-sac moments from London Bridge station. The Northern line connects directly to Waterloo for King's Strand campus in 3 minutes, while London Bridge mainline serves Denmark Hill directly. A Day Lewis pharmacy is on Tower Bridge Road. The world-famous Borough Market is on the doorstep for fresh food shopping.

A bright studio flat on Rennie Street in Waterloo, perfectly positioned for King's College students. King's Strand campus is a pleasant 10-minute walk along the South Bank. Waterloo station provides Northern line access to London Bridge for onward travel to Denmark Hill campus. A Boots pharmacy is on Waterloo Road, and the area offers unmatched cultural amenities including the National Theatre and BFI.

An affordable studio flat on Newington Causeway in Newington, offering excellent value for King's College students. Elephant & Castle station (Northern and Bakerloo lines) is a 3-minute walk, providing direct access to Waterloo for King's Strand campus. A pharmacy is located on the nearby Elephant & Castle shopping parade. The Imperial War Museum and pleasant green spaces are close by.

A stylish one-bedroom flat on Amhurst Road in the heart of Hackney, overlooking Hackney Downs. Hackney Central and Hackney Downs stations provide excellent Overground connections to Stratford, Liverpool Street, and beyond. Broadway Market and London Fields are a short walk away, offering trendy cafes, restaurants, and the famous Saturday market.

location: 14 Lower Clapton Road, Clapton, London, E5 0NT
description: A spacious two-bedroom flat in a handsome period conversion on Lower Clapton Road. Clapton station (Overground) connects to Liverpool Street in 15 minutes. The property features a private garden and is close to the leafy surroundings of Clapton Pond and Hackney Marshes. The area has become a sought-after destination with artisan bakeries and independent shops.

An elegant one-bedroom flat on the desirable Cross Street in Islington, set within a beautiful Georgian terrace. Angel station (Northern line) is a 6-minute walk, providing swift access to the City and beyond. Upper Street and Chapel Market offer an array of shops, restaurants, and the famous Islington Green. A premium address in one of London's most sought-after neighbourhoods.

A contemporary two-bedroom flat on Parkway in the heart of Camden Town. Camden Town station (Northern line) is moments away, connecting to Euston and King's Cross in minutes. The property sits between the vibrant Camden Market and the tranquil Regent's Park, offering the best of both worlds. Camden Lock and the canal towpath are perfect for weekend walks.

location: 18 Uxbridge Road, Shepherd's Bush, London, W12 8LJ
description: A well-appointed one-bedroom flat on Uxbridge Road in Shepherd's Bush, perfectly positioned for shopping and transport. Shepherd's Bush station (Central line) and Goldhawk Road (Hammersmith & City) provide excellent connections across London. Westfield shopping centre is a 5-minute walk, offering extensive retail and dining options, along with a Vue cinema.

A generous two-bedroom flat on The Broadway in Ealing, offering excellent space for the price. Ealing Broadway station (Central, District lines, and Elizabeth line) connects to Bond Street in 14 minutes. The property is close to the green expanses of Ealing Common and Walpole Park, and Ealing's restaurant quarter on Haven Green is just around the corner.

A spacious two-bedroom flat on George Street in central Croydon, offering outstanding value for space. East Croydon station provides fast trains to London Bridge in 16 minutes and to Victoria in 19 minutes. The Croydon tram network connects to Wimbledon and Beckenham. Centrale and Whitgift shopping centres offer extensive retail options right on the doorstep.

A modern one-bedroom flat on Brixton Hill, moments from the vibrant heart of Brixton. Brixton station (Victoria line) connects to Oxford Circus in 9 minutes. The renowned Brixton Village and Pop Brixton offer an incredible range of international cuisine, while Brockwell Park provides a beautiful green retreat with its famous lido.

A bright two-bedroom flat on Rye Lane in Peckham, at the centre of one of London's most dynamic neighbourhoods. Peckham Rye station provides Overground and Southern services to London Bridge in 11 minutes. The iconic Peckham Levels and Frank's Cafe rooftop bar are local landmarks, and Peckham Rye Park offers a beautiful green escape.

location: 8 Lee High Road, Lewisham, London, SE13 5PL
description: An affordable one-bedroom flat on Lee High Road in Lewisham, offering great value in a well-connected location. Lewisham station (DLR and Southeastern trains) connects to London Bridge in 9 minutes and Canary Wharf via DLR in 20 minutes. The property is close to the historic Blackheath village and its beautiful heath, plus the daily Lewisham Market for fresh produce.

A contemporary two-bedroom flat on Celebration Avenue in Stratford, situated in the thriving East Village development. Stratford station (Central, Jubilee, DLR, Elizabeth line, and Overground) offers some of London's best transport connections. Westfield Stratford City, the Queen Elizabeth Olympic Park, and the new East Bank cultural quarter are all within walking distance.

location: 16 Westferry Road, Canary Wharf, London, E14 8ND
description: A premium one-bedroom flat on Westferry Road in Canary Wharf, at the heart of London's financial district. Canary Wharf station (Jubilee line and Elizabeth line) connects to Bond Street in 14 minutes via Crossrail. The area offers world-class dining, shopping at Jubilee Place, and the beautiful waterside walkways of the Docklands.

A smart one-bedroom flat on London Street in Paddington, perfectly located for transport and leisure. Paddington station (Bakerloo, Circle, District, Hammersmith & City lines, plus Elizabeth line and Heathrow Express) is a 2-minute walk. Hyde Park and Kensington Gardens are on the doorstep, offering 400 acres of green space in the heart of London.

location: 11 Kilburn High Road, Kilburn, London, NW6 5UH
description: A well-proportioned two-bedroom flat on Kilburn High Road, offering excellent space in a convenient location. Kilburn station (Jubilee line) and Kilburn Park (Bakerloo line) provide direct access to the West End and City. The leafy Queen's Park is nearby with its popular farmers' market, and the area has a growing selection of independent cafes and restaurants.

A spacious two-bedroom flat on Mitcham Lane in Tooting, offering great value in a family-friendly area. Tooting Bec station (Northern line) connects to the City and West End in under 25 minutes. The famous Tooting Market and the wide range of South Asian restaurants on Tooting High Road make this one of London's most exciting foodie destinations.

A well-presented one-bedroom flat on King Street in Hammersmith, close to the Thames riverside. Hammersmith station (Piccadilly, District, and Hammersmith & City lines) connects to central London in 15 minutes. The area offers excellent entertainment at the Hammersmith Apollo and riverside pubs, plus the peaceful Furnivall Gardens and Thames Path.

A stylish one-bedroom flat on Old Street in Shoreditch, at the epicentre of London's tech and creative scene. Old Street station (Northern line) connects to the City in 3 minutes and the West End in under 10. The area is renowned for its street art, independent galleries, and vibrant nightlife, with Boxpark and the Curtain Road bars all within easy reach.
